basics.name: prefix
basics.label: Resource Prefix
basics.toolTip: A short prefix for all Azure resource names (2-8 lowercase alphanumeric characters or hyphens). For example, 'kze' creates resources like 'kze-sql', 'kze-api', etc.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 2-8 characters: lowercase letters, digits, or hyphens. Must start with a letter and end with a letter or digit.

options.text: The enterprise template uses AAD-only SQL authentication (no SQL admin password). You must provide an Azure AD user or group that will be the SQL administrator.

elements.name: aadAdminDisplayName
elements.label: AAD Admin Display Name
elements.toolTip: Display name of the Azure AD user or group that will be the SQL Server administrator. Example: 'DBA Team' or 'Jane Doe'.

constraints.validationMessage: Display name is required. Maximum 128 characters.

elements.name: aadAdminObjectId
elements.label: AAD Admin Object ID
elements.toolTip: The Object ID (GUID) of the Azure AD user or group. Find it in Azure Portal > Azure Active Directory > Users (or Groups) > select the user/group > copy the Object ID from the Overview blade.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid GUID in the format xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx. Find it in Azure AD > Users or Groups > Overview.

elements.name: adminPassword
elements.toolTip: Password for the Knowz application SuperAdmin account (used to log in to the Web UI). Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 8-128 characters with at least 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character (@$!%*?&).

elements.name: openaiMode
elements.label: Azure OpenAI Configuration
elements.toolTip: Choose how to configure Azure OpenAI. 'Deploy New' creates a new resource behind a private endpoint. 'Use Existing' references an Azure OpenAI resource you already have. 'External' uses a non-Azure endpoint.

elements.name: existingOpenAiName
elements.label: Existing OpenAI Resource Name
elements.toolTip: Name of your existing Azure OpenAI or AI Services resource.

elements.name: existingOpenAiResourceGroup
elements.label: Resource Group
elements.toolTip: Resource group containing the existing OpenAI resource. Leave empty to use the deployment resource group.

elements.name: externalOpenAiEndpoint
elements.label: External OpenAI Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Your OpenAI-compatible API endpoint URL (e.g., https://your-openai.openai.azure.com/).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

elements.name: externalOpenAiKey
elements.toolTip: API key for your external OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

elements.name: chatDeploymentName
elements.label: Chat Model Deployment Name
elements.toolTip: The deployment name for the chat completion model on your existing or external endpoint.

elements.name: embeddingDeploymentName
elements.label: Embedding Model Deployment Name
elements.toolTip: The deployment name for the embedding model on your existing or external endpoint.

elements.name: searchSku
elements.label: AI Search SKU
elements.toolTip: The pricing tier for Azure AI Search. Enterprise deployments require Standard or higher to support private endpoints and VNet integration. Standard2/Standard3 provide higher storage and replica limits.

elements.name: docIntelMode
elements.label: Document Intelligence Configuration
elements.toolTip: Choose how to configure Document Intelligence. 'Deploy New' creates a new resource behind a private endpoint. 'Use Existing' references a Document Intelligence resource you already have. 'External' uses a non-Azure endpoint.

elements.name: existingDocIntelName
elements.label: Existing Document Intelligence Resource Name
elements.toolTip: Name of your existing Azure Document Intelligence (Form Recognizer) resource.

elements.name: existingDocIntelResourceGroup
elements.label: Resource Group
elements.toolTip: Resource group containing the existing Document Intelligence resource. Leave empty to use the deployment resource group.

elements.name: externalDocIntelEndpoint
elements.label: External Document Intelligence Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Your Document Intelligence API endpoint URL (e.g., https://your-docintel.cognitiveservices.azure.com/).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

elements.name: externalDocIntelKey
elements.toolTip: API key for your external Document Intelligence endpoint.

elements.name: visionMode
elements.label: Azure AI Vision Configuration
elements.toolTip: Choose how to configure Azure AI Vision. 'Deploy New' creates a new resource behind a private endpoint. 'Use Existing' references an Azure AI Vision resource you already have. 'External' uses a non-Azure endpoint.

elements.name: existingVisionName
elements.label: Existing Azure AI Vision Resource Name
elements.toolTip: Name of your existing Azure AI Vision (Computer Vision) resource.

elements.name: existingVisionResourceGroup
elements.label: Resource Group
elements.toolTip: Resource group containing the existing Azure AI Vision resource. Leave empty to use the deployment resource group.

elements.name: externalVisionEndpoint
elements.label: External Vision Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Your Azure AI Vision API endpoint URL (e.g., https://your-vision.cognitiveservices.azure.com/).

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.

elements.name: externalVisionKey
elements.toolTip: API key for your external Azure AI Vision endpoint.

elements.name: imageTag
elements.label: Image Tag
elements.toolTip: The container image tag to deploy (e.g., 'latest', 'v1.0.0').

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid container image tag.

options.text: Images are public on GHCR. Credentials only needed for private registries.

elements.name: registryUsername
elements.label: GHCR Username (optional)
elements.toolTip: GitHub username or organization for GHCR authentication. Leave empty for public images.

elements.name: registryPassword
elements.toolTip: GitHub Personal Access Token with 'read:packages' scope. Leave empty for public images.

options.text: This template deploys with VNet isolation, private endpoints, Azure Front Door with WAF, AAD-only SQL authentication, and full diagnostic logging. All resources are policy-compliant for Azure landing zones.

elements.name: tags
elements.label: Resource Tags
elements.toolTip: Tags applied to all resources. Organizations typically add their own via Azure Policy. The template also applies default tags (project, environment, tier, managed-by).

options.text: Estimated monthly cost: ~$200-300/month for standard SKUs with Front Door Premium. Breakdown: Azure AI Search Standard (~$250), Front Door Premium (~$35), SQL Server (~$15), Storage GRS (~$2), Container Apps (~$10-15), Key Vault (~$1), Log Analytics (~$5). Azure OpenAI is pay-per-use based on token consumption. Document Intelligence is pay-per-page.
